label: Residuals Vault
description: Residuals Vault serves as the gaugeworks’ controlled repository for offcut prisms, calibration blanks, and vitrified shards whose charges remain within measured tolerances. Basalt-glass shelving is etched with index numbers and set behind grounded mesh screens that arrest stray arc and keep dust from drifting into optical assemblies. The floor continues the workshop’s mirror-slag inlays, but the pattern is reduced to a coarse grid used for quick tallying and alignment checks. A narrow return channel from the rear cistern trough runs under sealed grates, maintaining stable particulate humidity without exposing the room to open flow.
